description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a minimalist rectangular form and a steep gable roof. The exterior is clad in dark gray siding, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. Large windows dominate the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the open-plan living spaces visible inside. The house features a partially open upper floor, with interior rooms and a central hallway clearly visible from above. Surrounding the house are several leafy green trees, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The main entryway is sheltered by a small overhang and is located on the side of the building, accessible via a short path.
description: A modern, dark gray two-story house with a steep gable roof, large windows, and a minimalist design, surrounded by green trees.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the side and partial front of the house, with two trees in the foreground and visible interior rooms on the upper floor.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the large windows on the ground floor and the open-plan upper floor, with a tree to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back facade, minimal windows, and the gable roof's full length, with trees spaced around.
description_view_3: Side view showing the main entryway under a small overhang, a tree nearby, and the open upper floor layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Side entry with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a clean, unadorned door
